narration_text: Now we'll see how the transport layer interacts with the network layer. Look at the diagram on your slide — notice how the different components are connected, with the transport layer on top of the network layer. I want you to focus on the arrows representing the flow of data between these layers. Notice that the transport layer is responsible for ensuring reliable data transfer, while the network layer handles the actual routing of data. Let's think about this together, considering how these layers work in tandem to enable communication between devices. As we examine this relationship, keep in mind that this interaction is crucial for the functioning of the internet, and we'll explore this further in the next slide.
